title: crotalaria assurgens
intro: Crotalaria assurgens is a species of plant in the pea family, also known as legume, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Crotalaria assurgens include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce blood pressure. Crotalaria assurgens can be prepared in herbal form through infusion, decoction, or powder, and is often used to treat various health issues due to its diverse medicinal properties.
